js_242: Your taste IS the poll result. You’re a living sample of the national average!
js_243: Your choices line up with the majority to an uncanny degree. Product teams should be recruiting you — if you like it, the nation likes it. Just now and then, try the road less taken; there’s fun to find there too.
js_245: Mostly in sync with the crowd, but with a few opinions that are all your own.
js_246: You strike a nice balance between the comfort of the majority and your own taste. Your palate and personality make small talk easy — you click with new people over shared favorites.
js_248: Half mainstream, half unique — a sense of balance that never tips too far either way.
js_249: You follow the crowd when it suits you, and boldly go your own way when it doesn’t. You enjoy trends without getting swept up in them — your balance is your superpower.
js_251: Your taste over the majority’s. Picking differently from everyone else just comes naturally.
js_252: Your choices often land on the minority side. You’ve got a clear compass and trust your taste over trends — so when people call you “a bit different,” take it as a compliment.
js_254: The stats can’t quite contain you. People like you are genuinely rare.
js_255: A true rarity who takes the minority road on almost every choice. When the whole world says A, you see the charm in B. Your point of view is the opportunity no one else can spot.
